name: mtn-open-as-notebook
description: Open a Markdown file as a Wolfram notebook (MarkdownToNotebook) with a docked toolbar to save it back to Markdown (NotebookToMarkdown).

mtn.packageDirectory.markdownDescription: Folder that contains `MarkdownToNotebook.wl` and `NotebookToMarkdown.wl`. Leave empty to auto-detect by searching the file's ancestor folders and the open workspace folders.

mtn.wlCommand.markdownDescription: Command used to run the Wolfram kernel script (must accept `-f FILE`). Defaults to `wl`; use `wolframscript` or an absolute path if `wl` is not on `PATH`.

mtn.openWith.markdownDescription: Application to open the generated `.nb` with (passed to `open -a`). Leave empty to use the system default handler for `.nb` files, e.g. `Wolfram 15.0`.
